audit_result.proof_trace: Locally-produced data columns bypass anti-equivocation cache. The broadcastAndReceiveDataColumns path saves columns via ReceiveDataColumns but never calls setSeenDataColumnIndex, while the gossip subscriber path (receiveDataColumnSidecar:L42) does update the cache. This violates the invariant that all imported columns must be tracked.
audit_result.attack_scenario: Validator produces and broadcasts data columns which are saved to storage but not marked in the anti-equivocation cache, creating cache inconsistency that could allow duplicate column acceptance if re-submitted through different paths or enable equivocation detection bypass.

PROP-6a4369e9-inv-013.text: Anti-equivocation cache must be updated for all imported data columns regardless of publishing.
